steps.title: Find the value of 3x
steps.content:
• The equation $$3x = 30$$ directly gives the value of the expression $$3x$$.
  • Thus $$3x = 30$$.

steps.title: Compute 3x-12
steps.content:
• Replace $$3x$$ in $$3x-12$$ with 30: $$3x-12 = 30-12$$.
  • $$30-12 = 18$$.
  • That matches choice B — B is correct.
